page_metadata.biotools__summary: The SALAMI web server searches the protein data bank (PDB) for structures similar to input coordinates of a protein chain. Output is provided in a simple structure viewer with details of the sequence, structural similarity and sequence alignments.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The SALAMI web server searches the protein data bank (PDB) for structures similar to input coordinates of a protein chain. Output is provided in a simple structure viewer with details of the sequence, structural similarity and sequence alignments.
